result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-build-file [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  file          The file to build.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  -d|--debug    Show debug info.
  -o|--output   Specify an output path.

Usage: dotnet-build-file [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  file          The file to build.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  -d|--debug    Show debug info.
  -o|--output   Specify an output path.
